description:
Stop paying for Chatbots too. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tJQqAKpYhV0 

Everyone is launching AI transcription tools with subscriptions, dashboards, and monthly fees. But how hard is it really to build one yourself?

In this video, I show how to transcribe audio locally using OpenAI Whisper, an MIT licensed open source model, with no API keys, no subscriptions, and no external services touching your data. All you need is a CPU, a model file, and a simple CLI build.

We download a small GGML Whisper model, clone the repository, compile it, and transcribe a test audio file in minutes. That is it. No SaaS required.

This raises a bigger question. If open source models already do the heavy lifting, what are most AI startups actually selling? In many cases, it is just packaging and convenience.

If you are a developer, this might inspire you to build your own tools instead of paying for them. Or at least understand what is really happening behind the scenes.
fulltitle: Stop Paying for AI Transcription Services
